args: import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); c=d.get("tool_input",{}).get("command",""); m=(re.search(r"\bmake\b",c) and re.search(r"\b(clean|tidy)\b",c)); print(json.dumps({"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: 'make clean' / 'make tidy' is forbidden in this repo. It deletes untracked, locally-precompiled build tools (tools/gfx, tools/scan_includes) and every generated .2bpp graphic, none of which can be rebuilt in this environment (no working native C compiler). Use plain incremental 'make' instead."}})) if m else None
